title: `Eth #6278
definition:
Ittah-kazin = "time of the judge"

 1) one of the landmarks of the boundary of Zebulun; site unknown
nasbUsage:

 1) one of the landmarks of the boundary of Zebulun; site unknown

    NASB:  time of a ruler, a place on the border of Zebulun
